TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Bell_Chung, title = Bell_Chung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bell_Chung} }

S.FORM: Snluan qcinuh:藝人"Zhoŋki, bomaŋ Miŋki (1994 niã 4 tià 8 riŋ). Atayalay ni ukraŋor kiãda nu ga a kotusi ni vla ikũvum nu kiãda yĩnir. 2018 niã Amoŋ ãkumpit iatupa ikũvum nu Atipit ro la ikũvum nu pikitya kumpi ũvumu, wa il rupuðun niã Atipit ni vlatãmoriã Atayalayã. 'Tsũ' wĩra Amoŋ miayãðuñu.". Ivun kamo Kokoðun Kanãt kalayan nu savi Koruwan ivun kanãt Vita Nai Hakan Taña Si Rivuy idti Pikitya Savi mopa jwanya awan kayrulan Ivun kanãt 20171126 Xinbei Yiqi PAY- yisrin idayanma iakuat 20190409 kwyan ula'i wongluyaw 20190514 kwyan wongluyaw 20190611 kwyan wongluyaw, tukid ni Siteng-gua 20190727 kwyan wongluyaw, tukid ni Siteng-gua, kaosyong 20190821 kwyan wongluyaw, tukid ni Weli-mi'uri, Legacy Mini 20190928 Xinpei poka'ah usi sira kuwan sin tuzi, idayanma iakuat 20210926 110 Taiwan yanawon kuwan sin tuzi luwin, ivun fayu 20220326 Huan ge VIP cawu dikiw wongluyaw, karayawan usi idayanma iakuat 20220806 Zungtunpu 1HR wongluyaw, usi idayanma iakuat 20221222 Ayawu sauah yanawon kuwan sin tuzi luwin, usi idayanma iakuat 20230820 Kau shan palaw ivun wongluyaw, susra usi idayanma iakuat Sankawuniyan Nimha'ay tu kawasunan Chongchi Bell Facebook mulurun Chongchi Bell Instagram tuiza Chongchi Bell kuanpi YouTube mihis muka
S.PHON: snluan qʦinuħ:**"*ħoŋki, bomaŋ miŋki (**** ni* * ti* * ɾiŋ). atajalaj ni ukɾaŋoɾ ki*da nu ga a kotusi ni *la ik**um nu ki*da j*niɾ. **** ni* amoŋ *kumpit iatupa ik**um nu atipit ɾo la ik**um nu pikitja kumpi **umu, wa il ɾupu*un ni* atipit ni *lat*moɾi* atajalaj*. 'ts*' w*ɾa amoŋ miaj**u*u.". i*un kamo koko*un kan*t kalajan nu sa*i koɾuwan i*un kan*t *ita nai ħakan ta*a si ɾi*uj idti pikitja sa*i mopa ɟwanja awan kajɾulan i*un kan*t ******** xinbəi jiqi paj- jisɾin idajanma iakuat ******** kwjan ula'i woŋlujaw ******** kwjan woŋlujaw ******** kwjan woŋlujaw, tukid ni sitəŋ-gua ******** kwjan woŋlujaw, tukid ni sitəŋ-gua, kaosjoŋ ******** kwjan woŋlujaw, tukid ni wəli-mi'uɾi, ləgaʦj mini ******** xinpəi poka'aħ usi siɾa kuwan sin tu*i, idajanma iakuat ******** *** taiwan janawon kuwan sin tu*i luwin, i*un *aju ******** ħuan gə *ip ʦawu dikiw woŋlujaw, kaɾajawan usi idajanma iakuat ******** *uŋtunpu *ħɾ woŋlujaw, usi idajanma iakuat ******** ajawu sauaħ janawon kuwan sin tu*i luwin, usi idajanma iakuat ******** kau sħan palaw i*un woŋlujaw, susɾa usi idajanma iakuat sankawunijan nimħa'aj tu kawasunan ʦħoŋʦħi bəll *aʦəbook muluɾun ʦħoŋʦħi bəll instagɾam tui*a ʦħoŋʦħi bəll kuanpi joutubə miħis muka
S.FORM: Snluan qcinuh:藝人"Zhoŋki, bomaŋ Miŋki (1994 niã 4 tià 8 riŋ). Atayalay ni ukraŋor kiãda nu ga a kotusi ni vla ikũvum nu kiãda yĩnir. 2018 niã Amoŋ ãkumpit iatupa ikũvum nu Atipit ro la ikũvum nu pikitya kumpi ũvumu, wa il rupuðun niã Atipit ni vlatãmoriã Atayalayã. 'Tsũ' wĩra Amoŋ miayãðuñu.". Ivun kamo Kokoðun Kanãt kalayan nu savi Koruwan ivun kanãt Vita Nai Hakan Taña Si Rivuy idti Pikitya Savi mopa jwanya awan kayrulan Ivun kanãt 20171126 Xinbei Yiqi PAY- yisrin idayanma iakuat 20190409 kwyan ula'i wongluyaw 20190514 kwyan wongluyaw 20190611 kwyan wongluyaw, tukid ni Siteng-gua 20190727 kwyan wongluyaw, tukid ni Siteng-gua, kaosyong 20190821 kwyan wongluyaw, tukid ni Weli-mi'uri, Legacy Mini 20190928 Xinpei poka'ah usi sira kuwan sin tuzi, idayanma iakuat 20210926 110 Taiwan yanawon kuwan sin tuzi luwin, ivun fayu 20220326 Huan ge VIP cawu dikiw wongluyaw, karayawan usi idayanma iakuat 20220806 Zungtunpu 1HR wongluyaw, usi idayanma iakuat 20221222 Ayawu sauah yanawon kuwan sin tuzi luwin, usi idayanma iakuat 20230820 Kau shan palaw ivun wongluyaw, susra usi idayanma iakuat Sankawuniyan Nimha'ay tu kawasunan Chongchi Bell Facebook mulurun Chongchi Bell Instagram tuiza Chongchi Bell kuanpi YouTube mihis muka
S.PHON: snluan qʦinuħ:**"*ħoŋki, bomaŋ miŋki (**** ni* * ti* * ɾiŋ). atajalaj ni ukɾaŋoɾ ki*da nu ga a kotusi ni *la ik**um nu ki*da j*niɾ. **** ni* amoŋ *kumpit iatupa ik**um nu atipit ɾo la ik**um nu pikitja kumpi **umu, wa il ɾupu*un ni* atipit ni *lat*moɾi* atajalaj*. 'ts*' w*ɾa amoŋ miaj**u*u.". i*un kamo koko*un kan*t kalajan nu sa*i koɾuwan i*un kan*t *ita nai ħakan ta*a si ɾi*uj idti pikitja sa*i mopa ɟwanja awan kajɾulan i*un kan*t ******** xinbəi jiqi paj- jisɾin idajanma iakuat ******** kwjan ula'i woŋlujaw ******** kwjan woŋlujaw ******** kwjan woŋlujaw, tukid ni sitəŋ-gua ******** kwjan woŋlujaw, tukid ni sitəŋ-gua, kaosjoŋ ******** kwjan woŋlujaw, tukid ni wəli-mi'uɾi, ləgaʦj mini ******** xinpəi poka'aħ usi siɾa kuwan sin tu*i, idajanma iakuat ******** *** taiwan janawon kuwan sin tu*i luwin, i*un *aju ******** ħuan gə *ip ʦawu dikiw woŋlujaw, kaɾajawan usi idajanma iakuat ******** *uŋtunpu *ħɾ woŋlujaw, usi idajanma iakuat ******** ajawu sauaħ janawon kuwan sin tu*i luwin, usi idajanma iakuat ******** kau sħan palaw i*un woŋlujaw, susɾa usi idajanma iakuat sankawunijan nimħa'aj tu kawasunan ʦħoŋʦħi bəll *aʦəbook muluɾun ʦħoŋʦħi bəll instagɾam tui*a ʦħoŋʦħi bəll kuanpi joutubə miħis muka
